title: Trump threatens new rampage as Iran deal deadline nears
summary_full: The president vowed anew to destroy Iranian bridges and energy sites if a deal to open the Strait of Hormuz isn’t reached.
summary_public: The president vowed anew to destroy Iranian bridges and energy sites if a deal to open the Strait of Hormuz isn’t reached.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump threatens new rampage as Iran deal deadline nears
